hero.subtitle: Empowering Bangladeshi farmers and buyers with AI-driven tools, direct market access, and real-time agricultural insights — no middlemen, no barriers.
stats.title: Growing Together
buyer.label: For Buyers
buyer.subtitle: Connect directly with farmers across Bangladesh. Get the freshest produce at fair prices — no brokers, no delays, no hidden costs.
buyer.feature1Desc: Browse harvests directly from verified farmers across Bangladesh — quality grades, availability, and fair pricing.
buyer.feature2Desc: Trade directly with farmers. No brokers, no hidden markups — fairer prices for buyers, better income for farmers.
buyer.feature3Desc: Negotiate, arrange logistics, and build lasting relationships with farmers — all within the platform.
buyer.badgeDesc: No broker. No markup. Just fresh.
farmer.label: For Farmers
farmer.subtitle: From planting to profit — manage crops, track expenses, and grow smarter with AI-powered guidance built for Bangladesh.
farmer.feature1Desc: Track every crop from seed to harvest — health scores, growth stages, and real-time alerts all in one dashboard.
farmer.feature2Desc: Log every taka spent. See your margin, ROI, and seasonal profitability instantly — no spreadsheets needed.
farmer.feature3Desc: Intelligent fertilizer, irrigation, and pest management advice tuned to your specific land, soil, and season.
farmer.feature4Desc: Generate a full seasonal plan in 3 steps. Powered by Bangladesh DAE agricultural guidelines.
service.label: Our Services
service.subtitle: From AI-powered crop planning to direct market access — SmartAgri is the complete digital platform for Bangladesh's agriculture ecosystem.
service.item1Desc: End-to-end crop tracking with AI-generated seasonal plans tailored to your land, soil type, and district — powered by Bangladesh DAE guidelines.
service.item2Desc: A transparent marketplace where farmers list harvests and buyers connect directly — no brokers, no commissions, no inflated prices.
service.item3Desc: Upload a photo of your affected crop. Our computer vision AI identifies the disease, confidence level, and gives immediate treatment recommendations.
service.item4Desc: 10-day hyper-local forecasts with farming-specific alerts — rain warnings, frost advisories, irrigation scheduling, and optimal harvest windows.
service.item5Desc: Agriculture students connect directly with verified farmers for field research, thesis data collection, and mentorship — bridging academia and ground reality.
how.label: How It Works
how.subtitle: Three steps connect a farmer's harvest directly to a buyer's table — with AI making every deal fast and fair.
how.step1Desc: Farmers upload harvest details — crop type, quantity, quality grade, location, and expected ready date. Takes under 2 minutes.
how.step2Desc: Our AI verifies the listing, suggests a fair market price based on live data, and surfaces it to the most relevant buyers nearby.
how.step3Desc: Buyers browse, message farmers directly, negotiate terms, and finalise deals — no broker, no commission, no delay.

about.label: About SmartAgri
ai.chat1: My rice crop leaves are turning yellow. What should I do?
ai.chat2: This looks like nitrogen deficiency. Apply urea fertilizer at 20kg/bigha and ensure proper irrigation. I also recommend checking for root rot if yellowing persists after 5 days.
ai.chat3: What's the best time to harvest boro rice in Rajshahi?
ai.chat4: For Rajshahi division, boro rice is typically ready mid-April to early May. Harvest when 80% of grains turn golden — moisture content should be around 20-25%.
planner.step1Desc: Select your crop type, planting date, and season from our Bangladesh-specific database.
planner.step2Desc: Enter your division, district, and upazila for hyper-local recommendations.
planner.step3Desc: Receive a complete seasonal plan — irrigation schedule, fertilizer doses, pest alerts, and harvest date.
student.feature1Desc: Connect with verified farmers for field studies, soil data, and agricultural research projects across Bangladesh.
student.feature2Desc: Build direct relationships with experienced farmers for mentorship, thesis guidance, and on-ground insights.
student.feature3Desc: Access real-time crop prices, demand curves, and seasonal trends — perfect for academic research and reports.
student.feature4Desc: Use the AI assistant to explore agricultural science, get research explanations, and deepen your agronomic knowledge.
